subject: fix(export): bump WebP quality to 0.98 for smoother gradients
body:
WebP lossy encoder handles smooth gradients differently from JPEG —
at 0.95 it can show subtle blocking on vignettes. Bumped to 0.98
while keeping JPG at 0.95 where it already looks perfect.

Tags: export, quality, webp
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: export-quality
Semver: patch
